CVE-2020-9283.title: golang.org/x/crypto before v0.0.0-20200220183623-bac4c82f6975 for ...
CVE-2020-9283.description: golang.org/x/crypto before v0.0.0-20200220183623-bac4c82f6975 for Go allows a panic during signature verification in the golang.org/x/crypto/ssh package. A client can attack an SSH server that accepts public keys. Also, a server can attack any SSH client.
